real: The HTML demo uses committed compiler, runtime, and validation artifacts.
The interactive LLM answer is deterministic so the interview demo works without CoreML, iPhone, Xcode, Ollama, or GPU setup.
not_claimed: These scenarios are not real iPhone camera captures.
The demo does not run production vLLM, SGLang, Triton, TensorRT-LLM, or live CoreML inference.
